sink.preCopyScript: IF OBJECT_ID('EDW.DIM_ERP_VENDOR')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE EDW.DIM_ERP_VENDOR
IF OBJECT_ID('EDW.DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE EDW.DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT
IF OBJECT_ID('EDW.DIM_ERP_BRANCH')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE EDW.DIM_ERP_BRANCH

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
CustomerID	
,CustomerName	
,
CASE 
WHEN CustomerClassDescription IN ('BYLT Digital','BYLT')														THEN 'BYLT DIGITAL' 
WHEN CustomerClassDescription IN ('Max Home','MAXHOME')															THEN 'EAST DIVISION' 
WHEN CustomerClassDescription IN ('CLOSETAM','Closet America')													THEN 'CLOSET AMERICA' 
WHEN CustomerClassDescription IN ('Home Forever Bath','Pacific Bath','HFB','PACIFIC')							THEN 'WEST DIVISION' 
WHEN CustomerClassDescription IN ('MADCITY','Mad City')															THEN 'MADCITY' 
WHEN CustomerClassDescription IN ('Rite Windows','RITE','HOMESMART')											THEN 'NORTHEAST DIVISION' 
WHEN CustomerClassDescription IN ('STATEWIDE','Statewide Remodeling')											THEN 'STATEWIDE REMODELING' 
WHEN CustomerClassDescription IN ('RCC','Renuity Concrete Coatings','Paradise Home Improvement','PARADISE')		THEN 'RENUITY CONCRETE COATINGS' 
ELSE CustomerClassDescription END AS CustomerClassDescription
,
CASE 
WHEN CustomerClass IN ('BYLT Digital','BYLT')														THEN 'BYLT DIGITAL' 
WHEN CustomerClass IN ('Max Home','MAXHOME')														THEN 'EAST DIVISION' 
WHEN CustomerClass IN ('CLOSETAM','Closet America')													THEN 'CLOSET AMERICA' 
WHEN CustomerClass IN ('Home Forever Bath','Pacific Bath','HFB','PACIFIC')							THEN 'WEST DIVISION' 
WHEN CustomerClass IN ('MADCITY','Mad City')														THEN 'MADCITY' 
WHEN CustomerClass IN ('Rite Windows','RITE','HOMESMART')											THEN 'NORTHEAST DIVISION' 
WHEN CustomerClass IN ('STATEWIDE','Statewide Remodeling')											THEN 'STATEWIDE REMODELING' 
WHEN CustomerClass IN ('RCC','Renuity Concrete Coatings','Paradise Home Improvement','PARADISE')	THEN 'RENUITY CONCRETE COATINGS' 
ELSE CustomerClass END AS CustomerClass

FROM ODS.ERP_CUSTOMER_MASTER

sink.preCopyScript: IF OBJECT_ID('EDW.DIM_ERP_ORGANIZATION')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE EDW.DIM_ERP_ORGANIZATION
IF OBJECT_ID('EDW.DIM_ERP_PRODUCT')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE EDW.DIM_ERP_PRODUCT
IF OBJECT_ID('EDW.DIM_ERP_SOURCE')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE EDW.DIM_ERP_SOURCE
IF OBJECT_ID('EDW.DIM_ERP_SOURCE_VENDOR')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE EDW.DIM_ERP_SOURCE_VENDOR
IF OBJECT_ID('EDW.DIM_ERP_DEPARTMENT')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE EDW.DIM_ERP_DEPARTMENT
IF OBJECT_ID('EDW.DIM_ERP_MARKETING_ACCOUNT')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE EDW.DIM_ERP_MARKETING_ACCOUNT
IF OBJECT_ID('EDW.DIM_ERP_ACQUISITION')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE EDW.DIM_ERP_ACQUISITION
IF OBJECT_ID('EDW.DIM_ERP_LEDGER')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE EDW.DIM_ERP_LEDGER

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
SubAccountCD,
SubAccountID,
Description,
CASE WHEN UPPER(Active)='TRUE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Active,
CreatedDate,
CreatedBy,
LastModifiedDate,
LastModifiedBy
FROM ODS.ERP_GL_SUB_ACCOUNT

Select * from (
SELECT
P.ProjectCD AS ProjectID,
P.CustomerID,
P.ProjectID AS ContractID,
P.ApproverID AS ProjectManager,

SUBSTRING(SA.SubAccountCD,1,3) AS ProductID,
SUBSTRING(SA.SubAccountCD,4,3) AS SourceID,
SUBSTRING(SA.SubAccountCD,7,3) AS SourceVendorID,
SUBSTRING(SA.SubAccountCD,10,4) AS DepartmentID,
SUBSTRING(SA.SubAccountCD,15,4) AS EmployeeID, -- Doubtful
SUBSTRING(SA.SubAccountCD,18,3) AS Acquisition,
P.Branch AS BranchID,
CBS.BillingPeriod AS BillingPeriod,
P.CurrencyRateForBudget,
P.BaseType,
P.DefaultSalesSubAccount AS SubAccount,
P.StartDate,
P.EndDate,
P.Status,
P.CreatedOn,
P.LastModifiedOn,
P.DefaultSalesAccountID AS DefaultAccount,
P.DefaultSalesAccountId_Desc AS DefaultAccountDesc,
P.DefaultSalesSubAccount AS DefaultSalesSubAccount,
P.DefaultCostSubAccount AS DefaultExpenseSubAccount,
P.TaskDescription AS ProjectDesc,
P.CreatedBy,
P.LastModifiedBy,
EPTM.[Enddate] as InstallEndDate,

P.RevenueBudgetLevel
,P.CostBudgetLevel
,P.Contact
,P.InventoryTracking
,P.BillingCurrency
,P.DefaultLocation
,P.LocationName
,P.TermsID_Description
,P.Terms
,P.BillingID_Description
,P.BillingRule
,P.ApproverID_Description AS ProjectManagerDesc
,P.SFOPPID_Attributes
,P.IsGlobal
,CurrencyRateType
,Row_number() over( partition by P.ProjectCD order by P.LastModifiedOn desc) as Rownum



FROM [ODS].[ERP_PM_PROJECT] P
LEFT JOIN ODS.ERP_PROJECT_TASK_MASTER_INSTALL_COMPLETE EPTM
On P.ProjectCD = EPTM.ProjectID
LEFT JOIN ODS.ERP_GL_SUB_ACCOUNT SA
ON P.DefaultSalesSubAccount = SA.SubAccountCD
LEFT JOIN ODS.ERP_GL_SUB_ACCOUNT SA_C
ON P.DefaultCostSubAccount = SA_C.SubAccountCD
LEFT JOIN ODS.ERP_CT_CONTRACT_BILLING_SCHEDULE CBS
ON P.ProjectID = CBS.ContractID
LEFT JOIN ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER SV1 
ON SUBSTRING(SA.SubAccountCD,1,3) = SV1.Value
AND SV1.SegmentID=1
LEFT JOIN ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER SV2
ON SUBSTRING(SA.SubAccountCD,4,3) = SV2.Value
AND SV2.SegmentID=2
LEFT JOIN ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER SV3
ON SUBSTRING(SA.SubAccountCD,7,3) = SV3.Value
AND SV3.SegmentID=3
LEFT JOIN ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER SV4
ON SUBSTRING(SA.SubAccountCD,10,4) = SV4.Value
AND SV4.SegmentID=4
LEFT JOIN ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER SV5
ON SUBSTRING(SA.SubAccountCD,15,4) = SV5.Value
AND SV5.SegmentID=5
LEFT JOIN ODS.ERP_SUBACCOUNT_SEGMENT_MASTER SV6
ON SUBSTRING(SA.SubAccountCD,18,3) = SV6.Value
AND SV6.SegmentID=6
)a 
Where Rownum=1

sink.preCopyScript: IF OBJECT_ID('EDW.DIM_ERP_BATCH')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE EDW.DIM_ERP_BATCH

scripts.text:
UPDATE TGT
SET TGT.UNI_AccountLevel1 = REF.UnifiedValue,
TGT.UNI_AccountLevel2 = REF.UnifiedValue_Group,
TGT.UNI_AccountLevel3 = REF.UnifiedValue_Category
FROM [EDW].[DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT] TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.AccountID = REF.TablePK_EDW
WHERE REF.TableName='DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT' 
AND REF.SourceSystem='ERP'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED'
AND REF.TableColumnName='AccountCode';

UPDATE TGT
SET TGT.UNI_Product = REF.UnifiedValue
FROM [EDW].[DIM_ERP_PRODUCT] TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.ProductID = REF.TablePK_EDW
WHERE REF.TableName='DIM_ERP_PRODUCT' 
AND REF.SourceSystem='ERP'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED'
AND REF.TableColumnName='Product';
 
 
----------------------
 
 
UPDATE P
SET P.UNI_Product = UN_PR.UNI_ProductName
FROM EDW.DIM_ERP_PRODUCT P
LEFT JOIN 
(SELECT DISTINCT ProductName,UNI_ProductName 
	FROM  [EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT] 
	WHERE UNI_ProductName IS NOT NULL AND ProductName IS NOT NULL AND ProductName!='') UN_PR
ON P.Product = UN_PR.ProductName
WHERE (P.UNI_Product IS NULL OR P.UNI_Product ='')
AND UN_PR.UNI_ProductName IS NOT NULL;

UPDATE TGT
SET TGT.UNI_MktAccount_SourceCode = REF.UnifiedValue,
TGT.UNI_MktAccount_SourceGroup = REF.UnifiedValue_Group,
TGT.UNI_MktAccount_Channel = REF.UnifiedValue_Category
FROM [EDW].[DIM_ERP_MARKETING_ACCOUNT] TGT
JOIN [EDW_DUN].[UNI_REF_MAPPING] REF
ON TGT.MarketingAccountID = REF.TablePK_EDW
WHERE REF.TableName='DIM_ERP_MARKETING_ACCOUNT' 
AND REF.SourceSystem='ERP'
AND REF.MappingInd!='UNMAPPED'
AND REF.TableColumnName='MarketingAccountID';

UPDATE A
SET A.UNI_Market = B.UNI_Market,
A.UNI_MarketGroup = B.UNI_MarketGroup
--A.UNI_CompanyReporting  = B.Division_MKTG
FROM [EDW].[DIM_ERP_BRANCH] A
LEFT JOIN 
(
SELECT DISTINCT ACU_ID,ACU_Market,UNI_Market,UNI_MarketGroup,Division_MKTG
FROM [EDW_DUN].[DIM_BRANCH_EXTN]
) B 
ON A.BranchCode = B.ACU_ID ;


--****************************

UPDATE A
SET A.UNI_CompanyReporting  = B.Division_MKTG
FROM [EDW].[DIM_ERP_BRANCH] A
LEFT JOIN 
(
SELECT DISTINCT ACU_ID,ACU_Market,UNI_Market,UNI_MarketGroup,Division_MKTG
FROM [EDW_DUN].[DIM_BRANCH_EXTN]
) B 
ON A.BranchCode = B.ACU_ID
WHERE A.UNI_CompanyReporting IS NULL OR A.UNI_CompanyReporting ='';

--*****************************
